name: io.github.mohanagy/madar
description: Task-aware local context packs for TypeScript/Node AI coding workflows.
title: Madar

environmentVariables.name: MADAR_TOOL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Optional MCP tool surface: core, strict (core plus context pack/expand), or full.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notes: Public npm package plus local auto-refresh MCP flow. The registry starts `madar serve --stdio --auto-refresh` in the active workspace, so Madar builds and refreshes its local graph without a static graph-path argument. Madar is the renamed continuation of `graphify-ts`; use `@lubab/madar` and `https://github.com/mohanagy/madar` as the canonical package and repository.
